title: iteratee() doesn't work with deep shorthand on Errors

labels.name: issue bankruptcy
labels.description: Closing the issue/PR to start fresh

comments.body: I was able to work around this by installing the `lodash-error-compat` package which patches the iteratee function to properly handle Error objects in deep shorthand notation. Just run `npm install lodash-error-compat` and it should resolve the issue with partition and other functions using deep shorthands.
